cpSection: ECT Level II Techniques and Applications Course 1.0

lessons.title: Standards and Specifications in Eddy Current Testing
objectives: Identify the major industry standards and specifications governing eddy current testing
Explain how codes, standards, and specifications relate to each other
Locate technique requirements within a governing specification
cp105Topics: 1.1 Explanation of standards and specifications used in eddy current testing

lessons.title: Working from Written Operating Procedures
objectives: Interpret the essential elements of an eddy current operating procedure
Execute a test in full compliance with procedure requirements
Recognize conditions requiring procedure clarification or deviation approval
cp105Topics: 1.1 Explanation of standards and specifications used in eddy current testing - procedure structure and essential variables

lessons.title: Procedure Compliance, Records, and Reporting
objectives: Document test parameters, standardization, and results per procedure and specification
Verify that reported results satisfy specification reporting requirements
Maintain traceability between reference standards, settings, and recorded data
cp105Topics: 1.1 Explanation of standards and specifications used in eddy current testing - documentation and reporting requirements
